name: Wand of Noisome Acid (6th-Rank Spell)
description:
This greasy stick emits a stomach-churning scent when held in a hand.

Activate

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast at 6th rank. A creature that takes initial acid damage from this spell become Sickened 1. Use your spell DC if the creatures attempts to recover from this sickness. This is an olfactory effect.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of Acid Arrow at 6th rank.
